body.title: Librarian: background folder indexer + git history search
body.result: FolderIndexer + search_indexed + search_git backends; 12 tests; config/librarian.yaml
body.description:
Extend Librarian search (T-librarian-fulltext-search) with: (1) configurable folder indexer — declare paths in librarian config, Scraps background job chunks files and stores in Postgres with tsvector; enables 'index everything in devices/', 'index ~/notes/'. (2) git history search — git log -S / git log --grep via subprocess, returns commit+message+file context. Together these make the search(query) tool complete: structured DB knowledge + live repo files (rg) + indexed external folders + commit history.

Indexer design: Scraps periodic job, file chunks stored in adc.palace or a dedicated search_index table (path, chunk_text, tsvector, updated_at). GIN index on tsvector. Incremental: only re-index files newer than last indexed mtime.

**Affected files:** devices/librarian/tools/search_tool.py (add git+indexed backends), devices/scraps/ (new indexer job), palace_bootstrap.py or migration (search_index table if needed), config (indexer_paths list)
**Design rules:** no-sqlite; Postgres for index store; incremental by mtime; config-driven paths (not hardcoded)
**Scope boundary:** IN: folder indexer job, git log search, config for watched paths. OUT: web crawl, vector/semantic search, real-time file watching (polling only).
**Completion criteria:** indexer job runs, re-indexes only changed files; search(query, source='indexed') hits content from a configured folder; search(query, source='git') returns matching commits with message+file; config has indexer_paths list; 5+ tests
